data.content:
Perfect! I have now read all the source files you requested. Here's a comprehensive summary of all the files in the ContosoUniversity application:

## **CONTROLLERS/**

### **BaseController.cs** (Lines 1-50)
Base controller with notification service and entity notification methods.

### **CoursesController.cs** (Lines 1-236)
Manages CRUD operations for courses including file upload for teaching materials with validation (max 5MB, image types only).

### **DepartmentsController.cs** (Lines 1-184)
Manages departments with concurrency conflict handling via RowVersion.

### **HomeController.cs** (Lines 1-53)
Home page and About page showing enrollment statistics.

### **InstructorsController.cs** (Lines 1-266)
Manages instructors with course assignments and office assignments.

### **NotificationsController.cs** (Lines 1-72)
API endpoints for retrieving and marking notifications as read.

### **StudentsController.cs** (Lines 1-240)
Manages students with pagination, sorting, and search functionality.

---

## **MODELS/**

### **Course.cs** (Lines 1-30)
Course model with CourseID, Title, Credits, DepartmentID, TeachingMaterialImagePath.

### **CourseAssignment.cs** (Lines 1-15)
Composite key linking Instructor to Course.

### **Department.cs** (Lines 1-33)
Department model with Name, Budget, StartDate, InstructorID (administrator), and RowVersion for concurrency.

### **Enrollment.cs** (Lines 1-22)
Enrollment model with Grade enum (A, B, C, D, F).

### **ErrorViewModel.cs** (Lines 1-12)
Simple view model for error pages.

### **Instructor.cs** (Lines 1-22)
Inherits from Person, adds HireDate with validation (1753-9999) and collections for CourseAssignments and OfficeAssignment.

### **Notification.cs** (Lines 1-48)
Notification model with EntityType, EntityId, Operation, Message, timestamps, and EntityOperation enum (CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE).

### **OfficeAssignment.cs** (Lines 1-17)
One-to-one relationship with Instructor (Location).

### **Person.cs** (Lines 1-31)
Abstract base class with ID, LastName, FirstMidName, FullName property.

### **Student.cs** (Lines 1-21)
Inherits from Person, adds EnrollmentDate with validation and Enrollments collection.

---

## **MODELS/SchoolViewModels/**

### **AssignedCourseData.cs** (Lines 1-10)
ViewModel with CourseID, Title, and Assigned flag.

### **EnrollmentDateGroup.cs** (Lines 1-14)
ViewModel for grouping students by EnrollmentDate with StudentCount.

### **InstructorIndexData.cs** (Lines 1-12)
ViewModel combining Instructors, Courses, and Enrollments.

---

## **DATA/**

### **DbInitializer.cs** (Lines 1-252)

data.content:
All **157 tests pass**. Here's a summary of what was created:

### `ContosoUniversity.Tests` project structure:

| Area | Test File | Tests | Coverage |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Models** | `PersonTests` | 5 | `FullName` computed property |
| | `ErrorViewModelTests` | 3 | `ShowRequestId` logic |
| | `NotificationModelTests` | 3 | Properties, `EntityOperation` enum |
| | `EnrollmentTests` | 7 | `Grade` enum, nullability |
| **Services** | `NotificationServiceTests` | 12 | Queue send/receive, FIFO, message generation, dispose |
| **Controllers** | `HomeControllerTests` | 6 | All 5 actions |
| | `StudentsControllerTests` | 21 | CRUD, sorting, search, pagination, date validation |
| | `CoursesControllerTests` | 19 | CRUD, file upload (extension/size validation, 5 image types) |
| | `DepartmentsControllerTests` | 14 | Full CRUD, ViewBag select lists |
| | `InstructorsControllerTests` | 14 | CRUD, course assignments, dept admin cleanup |
| | `NotificationsControllerTests` | 4 | JSON API endpoints |
| **Infrastructure** | `PaginatedListTests` | 10 | Pagination boundaries |
| | `SchoolContextTests` | 11 | DbSets, relationships, TPH inheritance |

Uses **EF Core InMemory** provider (no SQL Server needed) and **Moq** for `IWebHostEnvironment`/`IFormFile` mocking.
